ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, coach, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user's account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "age" INTEGER /* User's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "height" REAL /* User's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* User's weight in kilograms */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* User's self-reported fitness level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_days" (
  "activity_day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity day */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "total_minutes" INTEGER /* Total minutes of activity for the day */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered for the day */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of steps taken for the day */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Total calories burned during the day */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used to track the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_days_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_days_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_levels" (
  "activity_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity level */,
  "activity_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity level */,
  "calories_per_minute" REAL /* Average calories burned per minute for the activity level */,
  "recommended_minutes" INTEGER /* Recommended number of minutes per day for the activity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_minutes" (
  "activity_minute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity minute entry */,
  "activity_day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity day */,
  "activity_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity level */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes spent in the activity level */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity minutes */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_minute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_minutes_activity_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_level_id") REFERENCES activity_levels ("activity_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_minutes_activity_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_day_id") REFERENCES activity_days ("activity_day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_distances" (
  "activity_distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity distance entry */,
  "activity_day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity day */,
  "activity_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity level */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered in the activity level */,
  "pace" REAL /* Average pace (minutes per kilometer) for the activity distance */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Total elevation gain in meters for the activity distance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_distances_activity_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_level_id") REFERENCES activity_levels ("activity_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_distances_activity_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_day_id") REFERENCES activity_days ("activity_day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., step count, distance, exercise) */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the goal has been completed */,
  "reminder_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reminders for the goal (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for completing the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal being tracked */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of progress */,
  "progress_value" INTEGER /* Value of progress (e.g., number of steps taken) */,
  "percentage_completed" REAL /* Percentage of the goal completed */,
  "remaining_value" INTEGER /* Remaining value to reach the goal */,
  "reward_points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned for the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., goal achieved, milestone reached) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message contained in the alert */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the alert has been read */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the device */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time the device was last synchronized with the platform */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
